channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][剧场版][CAST][公开] Anime News Network Witch on Holy Night 动画 Film 公开 Returning Main 声优阵容
item.description: Haruka Tomatsu, Kana Hanazawa, Yūsuke Kobayashi star in film opening later this year ― ufotable revealed returning cast on Saturday for the anime film of Type-Moon's visual novel PC game Mahōtsukai... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Witch on the Holy Night Anime Film Reveals Returning Main Cast

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Cyborg 009: Nemesis 动画 Casts Yūki Kaji as Joe Shimamura
item.description: 9 cast members for Nemesis group also revealed ― The staff of Ishimori Production's Cyborg 009: Nemesis, a new anime based on Shōtarō Ishinomori's Cyborg 009 manga, revealed on Thursday that Yūki... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Cyborg 009: Nemesis Anime Casts Yūki Kaji as Joe Shimamura

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network TBS Sand B Company Acquires Xenotoon CG 动画 Studio
item.description: Studio that produced Genshō Yasuda's Make A Girl anime film to merge with Seven Arcs in mid-2027 ― Tokyo Broadcasting System (TBS) Holdings' Sand B anime planning and development company acquired a... | 来源: ANN | 原文: TBS' Sand B Company Acquires Xenotoon CG Anime Studio
